title: Context, Cancellation, Backpressure, Structured Concurrency, and Leaks · Language Lens: Backpressure Bounded Work
summary: A request launches several operations; one fails, one blocks, one outlives the caller, and overload grows without bound. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go backpressure bounded work increment in a cancelable bounded worker group. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Bound queues and concurrency, choose block, reject, shed, or degrade behavior, and measure saturation.
Use context values only for request-scoped cross-boundary metadata with collision-safe keys, not optional parameters.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Backpressure Bounded Work · Theory Backpressure Bounded Work
steps.instruction:
theory case — Request 3 launches validation, lookup, and audit work under a 60ms deadline. One stage blocks after cancellation and the input queue grows. Bound concurrency, propagate cause, choose overload behavior, and prove no goroutine remains.
